testcase.classname: SSP Books API POST /api/auth/login should require email and password
testcase.name: SSP Books API POST /api/auth/login should require email and password

testcase.classname: SSP Books API GET /api/auth/me should require authentication
testcase.name: SSP Books API GET /api/auth/me should require authentication

testcase.classname: SSP Books API GET /api/courses should return courses list
testcase.name: SSP Books API GET /api/courses should return courses list
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: 200 Received: 500 at Object.toBe (C:\Users\Admin\Music\Sonar\ssp_books_backend\tests\api.test.js:67:30) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:104:5)
